MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Stern, Esq. 4150421-6500 of Shartsis Friese LLP for Subpoenaed party Wetherby Asset Mgmt.
Melinda Palozola Esq. 415-217-6990 of Manning Kass Ellrod Ramirez Trester LLP for Defendant Realize CPA LLP
David McMonigle, Esq. of Long Levit LLP for Defendants Donnelly & Farrella Braun.
Richard Emereson, 206-227-1155, for Third Party in Pro Per
Court reporter: Alisa James, CSR #10901, 866-299-5127, Reported.

All parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BRIAN DONNELLY, FARELLA BRAUN + MARTEL LLP's MOTION To Compel Production Of Documents is granted in part. Counsel for Defendant Donnelly & Farrella Braun is to prepare and circulate a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must send it directly to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court will sign an order by 11/28/17.

An order/stipulation for protective order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Alisa James, CSR #10901, 866-299-5127, Reported.(D302/JPT/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kenneth R. Van Vleck, of GCA Law Partners LLP, Tel. 650.237.7230, for plaintiffs;
Jill K. Cohoe, of Manning & Kass Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP, Tel. 415.217.6990, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT TRACY HOM, JULIAN ZARAGOZA, REALIZE CPA, LLP MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is partially granted and partially denied. Plaintiff stipulates to striking the prayer for attorneys fees; that portion of the motion is GRANTED. Because plaintiff may seek expert fees under CCP 998, that part of the motion is DENIED. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No. 6576; Dept. 302.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kenneth R. Van Vleck, of GCA Law Partners LLP, Tel. 650.237.7230, for plaintiffs;
Jill K. Cohoe, of Manning & Kass Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP, Tel. 415.217.6990, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TRACY HOM, JULIAN ZARAGOZA, REALIZE CPA, LLP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Future harm can be damage and plaintiff adequately pled that she became legally obligated to pay taxes as a result of defendants' negligence. Failing to act as a reasonably careful professional would have can be a breach of fiduciary duty. (CACI 4101.). Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR No. 6576; Dept. 302.
